prestazioni: Upgrade to a **VAG Group 3.0L EA898 Evo (CWGD) twin-turbo V6** with a **Garrett GTX4274R Gen II** turbocharger (74mm compressor, 62mm turbine) per bank, paired with a **Precision Turbo & Engine 46mm wastegate** for precise boost control up to 28 psi, targeting **850whp on E85** with a **Motec M150 ECU** for full flex-fuel and torque vectoring integration.

Install a **Mahle Motorsport forged piston kit (10.5:1 CR)** with **Manley H-beam connecting rods** and a **Carrillo crankshaft** for bottom-end reinforcement, alongside a **DLC-coated (Diamond-Like Carbon) valvetrain** with **Ferrea Competition Series intake/exhaust valves** and **Schrick 280° camshafts** for optimized airflow in the EA898’s quad-cam setup.

Replace the stock 8-speed ZF 8HP95 transmission with a **ZF 8HP95X (high-torque variant)** reinforced with a **Sonnax billet valve body**, **FTX Racing triple-disc clutch pack**, and **South Bend Stage 4+ twin-disc clutch** for 1,200 lb-ft torque capacity, paired with a **Quaife ATB helical LSD** in the rear and **Audi Sport rear torque vectoring differential** for dynamic power distribution.
estetica: Fit a **Liberty Walk LB GRANDSPHERE widebody kit** (custom-fabricated for the Grandsphere’s 3.1m wheelbase) with **carbon fiber fender flares (2.5-inch extension per side)**, **aluminum overfenders**, and **3D-printed ABS lower splitters** for aggressive stance while maintaining OEM+ fitment.

Install a **Vorsteiner V-FF 107 22-inch forged wheel set** (front: 22x10.5 ET35, rear: 22x12.5 ET40) with **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (285/25R22 front, 325/25R22 rear)** and **HRE FlowForm FF03 center-lock adapters** for track-ready grip, paired with **Brembo GT-R 6-piston calipers (42mm pistons) and 420mm carbon-ceramic rotors** for uncompromised braking.

Apply a **full 3M Matte Graphite Wrap (Satin 2080 series)** with **custom laser-cut vinyl overlays** for the Audi Sport grille, **carbon fiber mirror caps (Rieger Tuning)**, and **LED strip taillights (Luxx Customs)** with sequential turn signals, complemented by a **Rocket Bunny-inspired ducktail spoiler (carbon fiber, 3-piece construction)** for aerodynamic balance at high speeds.
